title: Radium
description: A super-stable and optimized modpack, always up do date with mc versions ! made to be a base for modpacks
body:
**This modpack aims to be very stable and efficient, it can be used to base your modpack on it**

## 🖥️ Hardware
### Minimum :
- CPU : Dual-core 1.5+ GHz
- GPU : Integrated graphics with 0.5GB VRAM
- Dedicated RAM : 1GB
- Free Storage : 2GB
### Recommended :
- CPU : Quad-core 2.0+ GHz
- GPU : Graphics card with 2GB VRAM
- Dedicated RAM : 2GB
- Free Storage : 4GB
## 📈 Performance
- **FPS** : Min : ~1000 FPS | **AVG : ~1300 FPS** | Max : ~1500 FPS

- Test with : 12 Render Distence, Graphics Fancy, 1Gb Dedicated RAM

- World settings : Superflat world, No structures, Experiences activated, seed : 1

- Hardware used : Ryzen 5 7535HS, RTX 4060 Laptop, 16Gb RAM, using Linux

- Modpack version tested with : 1.0.0 Pre-1
## 📫FAQ
- I found a bug, how to report it ? : Join my [discord](https://discord.gg/pcGmgzm4TZ)

- Can y use Radium as a base in my modpack ? : Sure, it's the goal but give a credit and a link !
## ❓ Others
- The CPU and GPU requirements in this description were generated using AI (which may not be accurate)
- When a new Minecraft version is released, Radium updates ~1 week later

<details>
<summary>🧪 Versionning</summary>

## 🔍 Versioning Breakdown
- X : Major version (Breaking changes)
- Y : Medium version (Minecraft updates)
- Z : Minor version (Mod/Config updates or others things)

## 📌 Version Format
- Stable : X.Y.Z (Release, tested and stable)
- Pre-release : X.Y.Z Pre-X (Test version, may contain bugs)
## ⚠️ Pre-Release
- Pre Release = Test version, potentially with bugs and not polite

**⚠️ Note:** Pre-release versions will be marked as Alpha (untested) or Beta (partially tested).
</details>
